# Ayothedoc

> Managed AI Operations for growing businesses. We install your company's AI Operating System (AIOS) — wired into your tools and trained on your business — then run it for you. Live in 10 business days. Recover 40+ hours a month or you don't pay.

## What we do
- Install an AI Operating System: context about your business, connections to your tools, done-for-you automations, and a 24/7 cadence that runs while you don't.
- Operate and expand it for you on a monthly plan.

## Plans
- Free AI Readiness Audit: 10-minute score + the three highest-leverage automations for your business.
- AIOS Install Sprint: one-time, $7,500, live in 10 business days.
- Foundation: $1,000/mo — system installed, you drive it.
- Operations (most popular): $2,500/mo — we run it and ship one new automation weekly.
- Autonomous: $5,000/mo — a 24/7 AI operations layer across the business.

## Guarantee
Recover 40+ hours a month against your kickoff baseline, or we keep working free until you do. You own everything we build.
